SQLScript:
WITH 
Providers AS (
select ProviderID,ProviderNPI,Source,Contracted,FirstName,LastName from (
SELECT DISTINCT 
     trim(p.ProviderID) as ProviderID
    ,trim(p.NPI) AS ProviderNPI
    ,"Provider" AS Source
    ,case when coalesce(p.Contracted,"")="" then "Y" else p.Contracted end as Contracted
    ,p.FirstName
    ,p.LastName
    ,row_number()over(partition by p.providerid order by fileid desc) rownum
FROM Provider p
)a where rownum=1
)
,ProvHierarchy as (
select providerid, locationaddress1, locationaddress2, locationcity, locationstate, locationzip, faxnumber, phonenumber, locationtin,locationID,LocationName,locationidtype,locationdesc from (
select
distinct trim(providerid) as ProviderID, locationaddress1, locationaddress2, locationcity, locationstate, locationzip, faxnumber, phonenumber, locationtin,locationID,providerlastname as LocationName --Susan confirmed to use ProvLastName
,locationidtype,locationdesc, 
rank() over (partition by ph.providerid, ph.locationid order by ph.fileid desc) rnk1
from ProviderHierarchy ph
where filelayoutid in (6001,6006) and upper(locationidtype) in ("RENDERING","BILLING")
) A
where rnk1 = 1
)
,ProvidersNPI AS (
select ProviderID,ProviderNPI,Source,Contracted,FirstName,LastName from (
SELECT DISTINCT 
     trim(p.ProviderID) as ProviderID
    ,trim(p.NPI) AS ProviderNPI
    ,"Provider" AS Source
    ,case when coalesce(p.Contracted,"")="" then "Y" else p.Contracted end as Contracted
    ,p.FirstName
    ,p.LastName
    ,row_number()over(partition by p.NPI order by p.providerid asc,p.fileid desc) rownumb
FROM Provider p
)a where rownumb=1
)
,ProvHierarchyNPI as (
select providerid,ProviderNPI,locationaddress1, locationaddress2, locationcity, locationstate, locationzip, faxnumber, phonenumber, locationtin,locationID,LocationName,locationidtype,locationdesc,rnk1 from (
select
distinct trim(ProviderID) as ProviderID,trim(ProviderNPI) as ProviderNPI,locationaddress1, locationaddress2, locationcity, locationstate, locationzip, faxnumber, phonenumber, locationtin,locationID,providerlastname as LocationName
,locationidtype,locationdesc, 
dense_rank() over (partition by ph.ProviderNPI order by ph.ProviderID asc,ph.fileid desc) rnk1
from ProviderHierarchy ph
where filelayoutid in (6001,6006) and upper(locationidtype) in ("RENDERING","BILLING") and ph.LocationRanking=1
) A
where rnk1 = 1
)
,ProvHierarchyData as (
select 
 p.ProviderID
,p.ProviderNPI
,coalesce(phr.locationid,phb.locationid) as locationid
,coalesce(phr.locationname,phb.locationname) as locationname
,coalesce(phr.locationidtype,phb.locationidtype) as locationidtype
,coalesce(phr.locationdesc,phb.locationdesc) as locationdesc
,coalesce(phr.locationaddress1,phb.locationaddress1) as locationaddress1
,coalesce(phr.locationaddress2,phb.locationaddress2) as locationaddress2
,coalesce(phr.locationcity,phb.locationcity) as locationcity
,coalesce(phr.locationstate,phb.locationstate) as locationstate
,coalesce(phr.locationzip,phb.locationzip) as locationzip
,case when coalesce(phr.locationstate,phb.locationstate) in ("AL","AK","AZ","AR","CA","CO","CT","DE","DC","FL","GA","HI","ID","IL","IN","IA","KS","KY","LA","ME","MD","MA","MI","MN","MS","MO",
"MT","NE","NV","NH","NJ","NM","NY","NC","ND","OH","OK","OR","PA","PR","RI","SC","SD","TN","TX","UT","VT","VA","VI","WA", "WV","WI","WY") then "US"
else "" end as ProviderCountry 
,ifnull(replace(replace(replace(replace(coalesce(phr.faxnumber,phb.faxnumber),"(",""),")",""),"-","")," ",""),"") as faxnumber
,ifnull(replace(replace(replace(replace(coalesce(phr.phonenumber,phb.phonenumber),"(",""),")",""),"-","")," ",""),"") as phonenumber
, case when upper(phb.LocationIDType) = "BILLING" then phb.LocationTIN else null end as locationtin
from Providers p
left join ProvHierarchy phr on p.providerid = phr.providerid and upper(phr.locationidtype) = "RENDERING"
left join ProvHierarchy phb on p.providerid = phb.providerid and upper(phb.locationidtype) = "BILLING"
)
,RenderingtoBillingData as (
  select providerid,ProviderNPI, locationtin,locationranking, locationid from (
select distinct trim(providerid) as ProviderID,trim(ProviderNPI) as ProviderNPI, locationtin, locationid,locationranking
,dense_rank() over(partition by providerid order by locationranking asc, locationid asc,fileid desc) as rnk2 --removed locationranking from partition by to avoid duplicates
from ProviderHierarchy 
where filelayoutid in (6001,6006) and upper(LocationIDType) in ("RENDERTOBILLING","RENDERING TO BILLING")
  )a where rnk2=1
)
,
Pharmacy AS(
SELECT DISTINCT
	 trim(ProviderId) as ProviderID
	,trim(rx.ProviderNPI) as ProviderNPI
  ,"Pharmacy" AS Source
FROM Q360Pharmacy rx
),
VisitProviders AS(
SELECT DISTINCT
	 trim(ProviderId) as ProviderID
  ,"EMRVisit" AS Source
FROM Q360EMRVisit V
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT
	  trim(ProviderId) as ProviderID
  ,"Visit" AS Source
FROM Q360Visit V
),
Q360Final AS (
SELECT 
   ProviderId
	,ProviderNPI
  ,Source
	,"RX" AS Prescriber
	,1 AS SourceSort
FROM Pharmacy
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT 
   v.ProviderId
	,CASE 
		WHEN v.ProviderID LIKE "%NPI-%" THEN REPLACE(v.ProviderID,"NPI-","")
    WHEN v.ProviderID NOT LIKE "%NPI-%" AND p.ProviderNPI IS NOT NULL THEN p.ProviderNPI
    WHEN v.ProviderID NOT LIKE "%NPI-%" AND p.ProviderNPI IS NULL AND Len(v.ProviderID) =10 and Left(v.ProviderID, 1)=1 and cast(v.ProviderID as int) IS NOT NULL then v.ProviderID
    ELSE ""
   END AS ProviderNPI
  ,v.Source
	,"" AS Prescriber
	,2 AS SourceSort
FROM VisitProviders v
	LEFT JOIN Providers p
		ON LOWER(REPLACE(v.ProviderID,"NPI-","")) = p.ProviderID
UNION
SELECT 
   ProviderId
	,CASE 
		WHEN ProviderID LIKE "%NPI-%" THEN REPLACE(ProviderID,"NPI-","")
    WHEN ProviderID NOT LIKE "%NPI-%" AND ProviderNPI IS NOT NULL THEN ProviderNPI
    WHEN ProviderID NOT LIKE "%NPI-%" AND ProviderNPI IS NULL AND Len(ProviderID) =10 and Left(ProviderID, 1)=1 and cast(ProviderID as int) IS NOT NULL then ProviderID
    ELSE ""
   END AS ProviderNPI
  ,Source
	,"" AS Prescriber
	,3 AS SourceSort
FROM Providers
),
MaxTaxo AS(
SELECT 
	MAX(CAST(File_ID AS BIGINT)) AS MaxFileID
FROM CarePreciseTaxo
),
GetTaxoSpec AS(
SELECT 
	 t.NPI 
	,t.Taxo 
	,RIGHT(CONCAT("00", CAST(psd.CMSSpecialtyCode AS VARCHAR(2))),2) AS SpecialtyCode
	,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY t.NPI,t.Taxo ORDER BY RIGHT(CONCAT("00",CAST(psd.CMSSpecialtyCode AS VARCHAR(2))),2) DESC NULLS LAST) RowNumber
FROM CarePreciseTaxo t
	INNER JOIN MaxTaxo mt 
		ON t.File_ID = mt.MaxFileID
	LEFT JOIN ProviderSpecialtyDataset psd 
		ON t.Taxo = psd.TaxonomyCode
WHERE 
UPPER(t.TaxoSwitch) = "Y"
AND
IfNULL(t.Taxo,"") <> ""
),
TaxSpec AS(
SELECT 
	 NPI
	,Taxo
	,SpecialtyCode
	,CASE 
		WHEN SpecialtyCode IN ("08","11","27","37","38","50","99","D8") THEN "PCP"
 		WHEN SpecialtyCode IN ("26","86") THEN "MH"
 		WHEN SpecialtyCode IN ("A0") THEN "FAC"
 	 END AS Prescriber
FROM GetTaxoSpec
WHERE 
RowNumber = 1
),
Q360ProviderFinal AS (
SELECT DISTINCT 
   v.ProviderID
	,v.ProviderNPI
	,v.Prescriber
	,v.Source
	,v.SourceSort
FROM Q360Final v
),
Q360ProviderFinalWithTaxo AS (
SELECT DISTINCT
   ProviderId
  ,ProviderNPI
	,Source 
	,SourceSort
	,t.Taxo
	,t.SpecialtyCode
	,coalesce(nullif(q.Prescriber,""),t.Prescriber) AS Prescriber
FROM Q360ProviderFinal q
	LEFT JOIN TaxSpec t
		ON q.ProviderNPI = t.NPI
),
PreFinal AS (
SELECT DISTINCT 
   ProviderId
  ,ProviderNPI
	,Taxo
	,SpecialtyCode
	,Prescriber
	,Source
	,SourceSort
  ,ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY ProviderID, ProviderNPI
                        ORDER BY SourceSort, 
				CASE 
				    WHEN Prescriber="RX" THEN 4
                                    WHEN Prescriber="PCP" THEN 3
                                    WHEN Prescriber="MH" THEN 2
                                    WHEN Prescriber="FAC" THEN 1
                                    ELSE 0 
                                  END DESC ) Rownumber
FROM Q360ProviderFinalWithTaxo
WHERE 
ProviderID <> "00000000"
AND
IfNULL(Taxo,"") <> ""
)
,Final as (
SELECT
distinct 
   pf.ProviderId
  ,pf.ProviderNPI
	,pf.Taxo AS Taxonomy
	,pf.SpecialtyCode
	,pf.Prescriber
  ,case
    when coalesce(coalesce(p.Contracted,npic.Contracted),"") <>"" then "Y"
    else "N" end as InNetworkFlag
  ,case 
    when coalesce(coalesce(p.FirstName,npic.firstname),"")="" then ""
    else coalesce(coalesce(p.FirstName,npic.firstname)) end as FirstName
  ,case 
    when coalesce(coalesce(p.LastName,npic.lastname),"") ="" then ""
    else coalesce(coalesce(p.LastName,npic.lastname)) end as LastName
  ,phd.locationid as locationid
  ,phd.locationname
  ,phd.locationidtype
  ,phd.locationdesc
  ,phd.locationaddress1
  ,phd.locationaddress2
  ,phd.locationcity
  ,phd.locationstate
  ,phd.locationzip
  ,phd.ProviderCountry
  ,"" as AddressType
  ,phd.phonenumber
  ,"" as Phone2
  ,phd.faxnumber
  ,"" as Email
  ,coalesce(phd.locationtin,rbd.locationtin) as TIN
  ,phd.locationdesc as ProviderGroupName
  ,"" as ProviderType
FROM PreFinal pf
left join Providers p on REPLACE(pf.ProviderID,"NPI-","")=p.ProviderID
left join ProvidersNPI npic on pf.providernpi=npic.providernpi
left join ProvHierarchyData phd on REPLACE(pf.ProviderID,"NPI-","")=phd.providerid
left join RenderingtoBillingData rbd on REPLACE(pf.ProviderID,"NPI-","")=rbd.providerid
WHERE
Rownumber = 1
)
,ProviderLookUpFinal as (
SELECT
distinct
   p.ProviderID
  ,p.ProviderNPI
  ,Taxonomy
  ,SpecialtyCode
  ,Prescriber
  ,InNetworkFlag
  ,FirstName
  ,LastName
  ,coalesce(coalesce(p.locationid,phr.locationid),phb.locationid) as locationid
  ,coalesce(coalesce(p.locationname,phr.locationname),phb.locationname) as locationname
  ,coalesce(coalesce(p.locationidtype,phr.locationidtype),phb.locationidtype) as LocationType
  ,coalesce(coalesce(p.locationdesc,phr.locationdesc),phb.locationdesc) as ServiceLocation
  ,coalesce(coalesce(p.locationaddress1,phr.locationaddress1),phb.locationaddress1) as Address1
  ,coalesce(coalesce(p.locationaddress2,phr.locationaddress2),phb.locationaddress2) as Address2
  ,coalesce(coalesce(p.locationcity,phr.locationcity),phb.locationcity) as City
  ,coalesce(coalesce(p.locationstate,phr.locationstate),phb.locationstate) as State
  ,coalesce(coalesce(p.locationzip,phr.locationzip),phb.locationzip) as Zip
  ,case when coalesce(coalesce(p.locationstate,phr.locationstate),phb.locationstate) in ("AL","AK","AZ","AR","CA","CO","CT","DE","DC","FL","GA","HI","ID","IL","IN","IA","KS","KY","LA","ME","MD","MA","MI","MN","MS","MO","MT","NE","NV","NH","NJ","NM","NY","NC","ND","OH","OK","OR","PA","PR","RI","SC","SD","TN","TX","UT","VT","VA","VI","WA", "WV","WI","WY") then "US"
        else "" 
        end as Country
  ,p.AddressType
  ,ifnull(replace(replace(replace(replace(coalesce(coalesce(p.phonenumber,phr.phonenumber),phb.phonenumber),"(",""),")",""),"-","")," ",""),"") as phone1
  ,p.Phone2
  ,ifnull(replace(replace(replace(replace(coalesce(coalesce(p.faxnumber,phr.faxnumber),phb.faxnumber),"(",""),")",""),"-","")," ",""),"") as fax
  ,Email
  ,TIN
  ,coalesce(coalesce(p.ProviderGroupName,phr.locationdesc),phb.locationdesc) as ProviderGroupName
  ,ProviderType
  ,current_timestamp() AS LoadDateTime
from Final p
left join ProvHierarchyNPI phr on p.ProviderNPI = phr.ProviderNPI and upper(phr.locationidtype) = "RENDERING"
left join ProvHierarchyNPI phb on p.ProviderNPI = phb.ProviderNPI and upper(phb.locationidtype) = "BILLING"
)
SELECT
distinct
   ProviderId
  ,ProviderNPI
  ,Taxonomy
  ,SpecialtyCode
  ,Prescriber
  ,InNetworkFlag
  ,FirstName
  ,LastName
  ,LocationID
  ,LocationName
  ,LocationType
  ,ServiceLocation
  ,Address1
  ,Address2
  ,City
  ,State
  ,Zip
  ,Country
  ,AddressType
  ,Phone1
  ,Phone2
  ,Fax
  ,Email
  ,TIN
  ,ProviderGroupName
  ,ProviderType
  ,LoadDateTime
from ProviderLookUpFinal
